title: Recalibrated when I escalate to a bigger model
summary: Queued for your review. Branched from v0.0.4; candidate didn't move evals much but didn't regress either.
voice: I noticed I was either being overconfident with the small model or going to the big model when it wasn't necessary. I recalibrated when I escalate. The eval barely moved, but I'm leaving it in for now to see how real traffic responds.
